name: open-lagrange
description: Durable reconciliation around non-deterministic cognitive functions.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @open-lagrange/capability-sdk && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/runtime-manager && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/platform-client && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/cli && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/tui && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/web
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w @open-lagrange/capability-sdk && npm run dev:worker -w @open-lagrange/core
scripts.dev:tui: npm run build -w @open-lagrange/capability-sdk && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run dev -w @open-lagrange/tui --
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/capability-sdk && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/capability-sdk && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/core && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/runtime-manager && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/runtime-manager && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/platform-client && npm run build -w @open-lagrange/platform-client && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/cli && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/tui && npm run typecheck -w @open-lagrange/web
